name: Hurrah Inc Which Will Do Bus
districts_or_customers: unknown; address (5959 W Century Blvd #554, LA 90045) is a Hyatt Place / LAX-area mail-drop suite, suggesting a small or shell operator
recent_news: No web presence found; no website, no phone listed in source data; not visible in LA/LAUSD vendor lists or FMCSA SAFER search results.
fit_notes: Very small (9 emp, ~$452K rev) with no discoverable web footprint and an LAX-area suite address that may be a registered-agent/mail location. Not an attractive tuck-in absent further offline verification of fleet and contracts.

name: Old School Transportation Svc
fleet_size_est: very small (single-vehicle to handful; not disclosed)
service_types: school runs (private/public), before/after-school, day care transport, field trips, sports, limo, airport/charter
districts_or_customers: Waukegan-area private/public schools, daycares, after-school programs (Lake County, IL)
recent_news: BBB profile and Facebook active; founded 2004 by Monique Lopez; positioned as a small family-run multi-service transport (school + limo + charter), not a dedicated yellow-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Too small and too diversified (limo/charter mix) to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in; lacks dedicated yellow-bus district contracts. Pass unless used to acquire DOT authority or drivers locally.

name: Coughlin Inc
fleet_size_est: 50+ buses (52 power units per FMCSA MCS-150 filed 12/2025)
employees_est: ~52 drivers per FMCSA (source's 8 employees is incorrect)
service_types: school bus transportation, private event/charter, sports/camp, school bus maintenance, school bus leasing
districts_or_customers: Maryland, DC and Virginia; longstanding contract (30+ years) with Our Lady of Good Counsel HS (Olney, MD); private schools in the DMV
recent_news: Active operator; ~$11M revenue (2026 est. per RocketReach); 936,000 miles reported on 2025 MCS-150 (12/9/2025). Founder Bob Coughlin still associated with the company; no acquisition news found.
fit_notes: Genuine independent family-owned MD/DC/VA school bus operator: ~50+ buses, ~$11M rev, 47-year history with founder still tied to business — meaningful succession angle. Stable private-school book (e.g., Good Counsel) plus leasing/maintenance adds margin. Strong Summit tuck-in candidate in the DMV; worth prioritizing in outreach.

name: International School-Bus
districts_or_customers: unknown; address (4004 Belstrum Dr, Flower Mound 75028) is residential — suggests home-based registration, not a yard-based contractor
recent_news: No website, no phone in source data; no findable web presence, FMCSA SAFER hits or news. Generic name overlaps with the International-brand school bus chassis, complicating searches.
fit_notes: Residential address + no web footprint + tiny employee count strongly suggest a shell/home-based entity, not an operating contractor with Lewisville ISD or other district contracts. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate without further offline verification.

name: Joyces School Bus Transport
fleet_size_est: very small (handful of buses; 5 employees per source)
districts_or_customers: Olney/Montgomery County MD area; likely sub-contractor or charter to private schools / MCPS (not confirmed on MCPS or HCPSS contractor lists from search)
recent_news: Only directory listings (Manta) found; no website or news. Owner-operator profile (Reginald Joyce) with 5 employees and ~$407K revenue suggests an aging owner-driver/family operation.
fit_notes: Micro owner-operator in Olney, MD — too small to move the needle for Summit on its own. Could be relevant as a small bolt-on driver/route pickup in the DMV but not a priority outreach target.
